acceptance.evidence: Authorization binds the exact bundle id, artifact list, paths, artifact types, content hashes, validation lineage, chain id, and create-only permission.
Authorization drift or artifact-list mismatch fails closed before filesystem mutation.
Any existing bundle target fails closed during preflight before sibling artifacts are created.
Every created artifact is verified for existence, exact path, artifact type, and content hash.
The bundle reaches BUNDLE_VERIFIED only after all three artifacts are verified.
Replay persists bundle authorization, creation evidence, per-artifact verification, and bundle verification result.
The Marketing domain CLI path reaches BUNDLE_AUTHORIZED, ARTIFACTS_CREATED, BUNDLE_VERIFIED, REVIEW_COMPLETED, and TERMINATED.
The certified CLI acceptance created all three Marketing domain bundle artifacts in the repository governance directory.

partial_completion_boundary.expected_failure_behavior: All path and authorization failures are rejected before the first write.
partial_completion_boundary.successful_completion_behavior: No partial bundle completion is reported.
partial_completion_boundary.unexpected_io_failure_behavior: Fails closed and records created paths without forbidden rollback deletion.

validation.full_repository_tests: 4106 passed, 7 unrelated browser-companion constraint tests failed

known_validation_gaps: The full repository suite retains seven failures in browser-companion JavaScript constraint tests unrelated to the AiGOL domain bundle runtime.
